rules.rule_text:
title: Default Covenant HTTP Beacon
id: 07793b33-09c4-48e1-95a7-cd2e7f4ef31c
description: Detects URI combos used by Covenant
status: stable
author: NTT Security - Robin Hellsten
date: '2021-11-05'
modified: '2022-03-17'
references:
- https://github.com/cobbr/Covenant/blob/c53155615563cf68979820356b8430e4eb01207d/Covenant/Data/Profiles/DefaultHttpProfile.yaml
logsource:
  category: proxy
detection:
  selection:
    c-uri|startswith:
    - /en-us/index.html
    - /en-us/docs.html
    - /en-us/test.html
    c-uri-query|endswith:
    - '&v=1'
    c-useragent:
    - Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 6.1) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/41.0.2228.0
      Safari/537.36
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Rather common URL patterns as it want to blend in. False positives are possible
  (but not super common, as UA and query also needs to match)
level: medium
tags:
- attack.command_and_control
